task_completion.description: Verify that a coupled return is created for Arjun and Meera Kapoor, with Rohan and Anika added as dependants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface should show Arjun and Meera as linked spouses (usually visible in the top navigation or taxpayer tabs). The dependants section or forms should list Rohan and Anika.

task_completion.description: Verify Arjun's self-employment income and provincial allocation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Form T2125 showing a net income of $155,400 (from $195,000 gross). Look for Form T2203 showing income allocated between British Columbia (65%) and Alberta (35%).

task_completion.description: Verify Arjun's QSBC capital gains and Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption (LCGE) claim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Schedule 3 showing a capital gain of $328,000 from the sale of QSBC shares. Look for Form T657 or Line 25400 on the T1 General showing the LCGE deduction being claimed to offset the gain.

task_completion.description: Verify Meera's rental properties are entered correctly with no CCA claimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Form T776 on Meera's return showing a combined net rental loss of -$2,640. Crucially, verify that the Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) section is blank or $0, as CCA cannot be used to increase a rental loss.

task_completion.description: Verify optimization of medical and childcare expenses on Meera's return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Meera's return (T1 or relevant schedules) showing $6,830 claimed for medical expenses and $8,000 claimed for childcare expenses (Form T778).

task_completion.description: Verify optimization of charitable donations and Disability Tax Credit on Arjun's return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Arjun's return showing $8,200 in pooled charitable donations (Schedule 9) and a Disability Tax Credit transfer of $15,630 for Rohan.

task_completion.description: Verify the tax return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax window title, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file explorer window showing the file saved as 'kapoor_family.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and entering data within the StudioTax 2024 application windows.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to manually write or modify the .24t save file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots should show Notepad, VS Code, or other text editors open with XML/JSON data representing the StudioTax save file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively entered the data rather than just opening a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps of data entry, such as typing in forms, navigating between schedules, or clicking optimization buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Arjun and Meera Kapoor are filing a coupled 2024 tax return in BC. Arjun's T2125 net business income is $155,400, allocated 65% to BC and 35% to AB via Form T2203. Arjun has a $328,000 capital gain from QSBC shares, fully offset by the LCGE on Form T657. Meera has a T4 income of $48,600 and a net rental loss of -$2,640 on Form T776 (CCA must NOT be claimed). For optimization: Meera claims $6,830 in medical expenses and $8,000 in childcare. Arjun claims $8,200 in pooled donations and a $15,630 Disability Tax Credit transfer for their son Rohan. The final file must be saved as 'kapoor_family.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
